title: Set up and operate universal vehicle measuring systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Set up and operate universal vehicle measuring systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to set up and operate universal measuring system

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Set-up information is accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.4 Measuring equipment is selected, set up, and calibrated and checked for serviceability1.5 Work is planned to complete job requirements efficiently

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to set up and operate universal measuring system

elements.title: Carry out measurement activities

pcs.text: Measuring system is secured and adjusted to vehicle according to original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s recommended procedures and safety requirements2.2 Vehicle is measured in three dimensions according to OEM or authorised agency’s requirements and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to vehicle system or components2.3 Pre- and post-repair measurements are recorded according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measuring system is secured and adjusted to vehicle according to original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s recommended procedures and safety requirements2.2 Vehicle is measured in three dimensions according to OEM or authorised agency’s requirements and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to vehicle system or components2.3 Pre- and post-repair measurements are recorded according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measuring system is secured and adjusted to vehicle according to original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s recommended procedures and safety requirements2.2 Vehicle is measured in three dimensions according to OEM or authorised agency’s requirements and workplace procedures, and without causing damage to vehicle system or components2.3 Pre- and post-repair measurements are recorded according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out measurement activities

elements.title: Complete measurement processes

pcs.text: Final checks are made to ensure measurements are accurate, meet workplace expectations, and comply with OEM or authorised agency’s specifications3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored3.3 Measuring equipment is checked and maintained according to manufacturer specifications, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
